title: asperula cynanchica var. tenuiflora
intro: Asperula cynanchica var. tenuiflora, also known as the Slender Woodruff, is a perennial herb belonging to the Rubiaceae family. Traditionally, it is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and aiding in wound healing. Asperula cynanchica var. tenuiflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
